title: phlegmariurus ophioglossoides
intro: Phlegmariurus ophioglossoides, also known as the resurrection fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the lycopodiaceae family, which are small, non-vascular plants that can thrive in arid environments. The medicinal properties of Phlegmariurus ophioglossoides include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in health benefits, including its ability to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be dried and powdered for use in capsules or topical creams.
